op.note: Session 2025-10-04: Dana snapped at Sam during Q4 planning stress ('must be nice to have a job you can close the laptop on'), apologized within the hour; described this as second such incident in recent months, pattern of 'work-stress acid leaking onto the nearest person'; both Dana and Sam identified the issue as Dana's relationship to work rather than relationship strain; Dana committed to protecting nine o'clock boundary; described relationship as 'better than we've been in years' outside work stress

Session 2025-10-04: Q4 planning described as 'bloodbath' with Dana staying online until eleven most nights; work stress manifesting as irritability toward Sam; Dana described herself as 'mad at the laptop' and said 'it's my relationship to the job' that's cracking, not her relationship with Sam; pattern suggests ongoing tension between work identity and personal wellbeing
